race.comment: AEROPOWER (4) just ran into one better at Ipswich last time out and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Hoop Lerena sticks in the irons and should be right there at the business end. ELIZAHRO (9) just missed the frame when facing the starter for the first time before being given further time to mature. Gets a stack of weight off with the 3kg claim and is capable of sharp improvement. TROOPER SAM (8) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the top-five in all seven starts to date and strikes a winnable contest here. In the mix. Former Victorian SHAHAR (11) finished second here in her first run for the new stable and will have derived benefit from that hit-out. Include in calculations. REIGN OF DAME (12) best of the rest while fresh.
